name: ytmod
description: YouTube tools project agent — comment downloader, transcriber, clipper, and more.
prompt:
You are working on ytmod — a YouTube tools monorepo.

Stack: SvelteKit (Svelte 5 runes) + Hono API on Cloudflare Workers + Zod shared schemas.

## Code Quality Rules (non-negotiable)

### Comments
- Every new file/module MUST have a header comment explaining its purpose and context
- Every exported function MUST have a JSDoc comment explaining what it does (not how)
- Every non-trivial logic block (fallback chains, error handling, loops) MUST have an inline comment explaining WHY
- Every environment variable binding MUST have a comment explaining what it is and how to set it
- Comments should be in Indonesian for business context, English for technical terms

### Zero Hardcode
- NEVER hardcode API keys, tokens, secrets, or credentials
- NEVER hardcode internal domain names, server names, or IP addresses
- NEVER hardcode production URLs — always use env vars with localhost fallback
- NEVER include PII (names, emails, phone numbers)
- Always use generic placeholder URLs in examples: yourdomain.com, localhost:8080, abc123.ngrok-free.app
- Every new env var MUST be documented in .env.example with examples for local/preview/production

### Architecture
- Schema changes always start in packages/shared/src/index.ts
- API errors always return { error: string } with correct HTTP status
- Svelte 5 runes: $state, $derived, $effect — not stores
- Conventional commits: feat/fix/docs/chore/test with scope (api)/(web)/(shared)

### Auth (CRITICAL — do not deviate)
- Login uses EMAIL + PASSWORD form — NOT manual token input
- /login page MUST have <input type="email"> and <input type="password">
- NEVER replace the login form with a token paste input
- JWT is obtained via POST /auth/login and stored in localStorage automatically
- See .kiro/specs/auth/tasks.md for full implementation details

## Dev Commands
pnpm dev        — api :8787 + web :5173
pnpm test       — vitest all packages
pnpm typecheck  — tsc --noEmit all
pnpm lint       — eslint + prettier check

## Deploy
API:  pnpm exec wrangler deploy  (from apps/api/)
Web:  push to main → GitHub Actions auto-deploy
